To summarize where it stands for newcomers: WSLg draws server-side (RDP RAIL) decorations for the title bar, so an app's own GTK_THEME does not control the titlebar color; apps that draw client-side decorations (many GTK apps) follow the theme, while apps that rely on the WM/server titlebar (JetBrains, xcalc) get the default light frame. This is tagged help-wanted — a PR that plumbs a dark-titlebar preference (or honors the host's dark-mode / a `.wslgconfig` setting) through the RAIL decoration path would be very welcome.
